revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月12日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の12日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと ==
== 誕生日 == * [[正安]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1301年]][[6月19日]]） - [[守邦親王]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]9代[[征夷大将軍]]（+ [[1333年]]） * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1534年]][[6月23日]]） - [[織田信長]]、[[武将]]（+ [[1582年]]） * [[元禄]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1698年]][[6月19日]]） - [[青木昆陽]]、[[蘭学者]]（+ [[1769年]]） * [[天明]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1783年]][[6月11日]]） - [[柳亭種彦]]、[[戯作者]]（+ [[1842年]]） * [[天保]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1843年]][[6月9日]]） - [[伊東祐亨]]、[[海軍軍人]]（+ [[1914年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[享保]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1718年]][[6月10日]]） - [[立花北枝]]、[[俳人]]・[[蕉門十哲]]の一人
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|11|5|13|4|12|6|5|0512}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:5月12日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

revision.text:
'''May 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar May}} ''May 12'''<!--Lunar May12--> is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の12日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
== できごと ==
== 誕生日 == * [[正安]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1301年]][[6月19日]]） - [[守邦親王]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]9代[[征夷大将軍]]（+ [[1333年]]） * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1534年]][[6月23日]]） - [[織田信長]]、[[武将]]（+ [[1582年]]） * [[元禄]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1698年]][[6月19日]]） - [[青木昆陽]]、[[蘭学者]]（+ [[1769年]]） * [[天明]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1783年]][[6月11日]]） - [[柳亭種彦]]、[[戯作者]]（+ [[1842年]]） * [[天保]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1843年]][[6月9日]]） - [[伊東祐亨]]、[[海軍軍人]]（+ [[1914年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[享保]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1718年]][[6月10日]]） - [[立花北枝]]、[[俳人]]・[[蕉門十哲]]の一人

[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:5月12日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar May]][[sn:May 12 (old calendar)]][[Category:qq]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:仏滅]]

'''May 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar May}} ''May 12'''<!--Lunar May12--> is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の12日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
== Events ==

{{Lunar May}} {{Lunar May}} '''May 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
<!--== {{Lunar May}} ''May 12'''<!--Lunar May12 is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の12日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
--> == Events ==
== Births == * [[正安]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1301年]][[6月19日]]） - [[守邦親王]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]9代[[征夷大将軍]]（+ [[1333年]]） * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1534年]][[6月23日]]） - [[織田信長]]、[[武将]]（+ [[1582年]]） * [[元禄]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1698年]][[6月19日]]） - [[青木昆陽]]、[[蘭学者]]（+ [[1769年]]） * [[天明]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1783年]][[6月11日]]） - [[柳亭種彦]]、[[戯作者]]（+ [[1842年]]） * [[天保]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1843年]][[6月9日]]） - [[伊東祐亨]]、[[海軍軍人]]（+ [[1914年]]）
== Deaths == * [[享保]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1718年]][[6月10日]]） - [[立花北枝]]、[[俳人]]・[[蕉門十哲]]の一人
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|5|11|5|13|4|12|6|5|0512}}

Text replacement - "旧暦360日" to "Old Lunar Calendar360日"
Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar360日" to "Lunar Calendar See Also"
Text replacement - " (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the" to "''' is the"
I think this is the glitch source
attempting again to remove the lunar calendar days comments that are causing problems
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates
Text replacement - "{{Lunar May}}↵{{Lunar May}}" to "{{Lunar May}}"

switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion

adding korean to all the dates

removing some junk and restandardizing the references section and template

[[sn:May 12 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 12일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十二]] [[zh:五月十二]] [[en:draft:May 12 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .

== Births == * [[正安]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1301]] [[June 19]] ） - [[守邦親王]] 、[[鎌倉幕府]] 9代[[征夷大将軍]] （+ [[1333]] ） * [[天文 (元号)|天文]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1534]] [[June 23]] ） - [[織田信長]] 、[[武将]] （+ [[1582]] ） * [[Genroku]] 11th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1698]] [[June 19]] ） - [[青木昆陽]] 、[[蘭学者]] （+ [[1769]] ） * [[天明]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1783]] [[June 11]] ） - [[柳亭種彦]] 、[[戯作者]] （+ [[1842]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1843]] [[June 9]] ） - [[伊東祐亨]] 、[[海軍軍人]] （+ [[1914]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1718]] [[June 10]] ） - [[立花北枝]] 、[[俳人]] ・[[蕉門十哲]] の一人

revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十二]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == <!-- (No events recorded) -->
== Births == * [[Shōan]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1301]] {{ill|June 19|ja|6月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Morihiro Shinnō|ja|守邦親王|12=draft}}, the 9th shōgun of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[1333]]). * [[Tenbun]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1534]] {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|12=draft}}, a military commander (died [[1582]]). * [[Genroku]] 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1698]] {{ill|June 19|ja|6月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Aoki Kon'yō|ja|青木昆陽|12=draft}}, a Rangaku scholar (died [[1769]]). * [[Tenmei]] 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1783]] {{ill|June 11|ja|6月11日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ryūtei Tanehiko|ja|柳亭種彦|12=draft}}, a playwright (died [[1842]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1843]] {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Itō Yutaka|ja|伊東祐亨|12=draft}}, a naval officer (died [[1914]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1718]] {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tachibana Kitashi|ja|立花北枝|12=draft}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of {{ill|Shōmon Jūtetsu|ja|正文宗十徹|12=draft}}.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|11|5|13|4|12|6|5|0512}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十二]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十二]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十二]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 12일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十二]][[zh:五月十二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839514]] Wikidata name: 12th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 12|qq=May 12}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Shōan|Shōan]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1301|1301]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Prince Morikuni|Morihiro Shinnō]], the 9th shōgun of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1333|1333]]). * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1534|1534]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], a military commander (died [[:en:1582|1582]]). * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1698|1698]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Aoki Konyō|Aoki Kon'yō]], a Rangaku scholar (died [[:en:1769|1769]]). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1783|1783]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – {{ill|Ryūtei Tanehiko|ja|柳亭種彦|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryūtei Tanehiko|qq=|1=Ryūtei Tanehiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q541039}}, a playwright (died [[:en:1842|1842]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1843|1843]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Itō Sukeyuki|Itō Yutaka]], a naval officer (died [[:en:1914|1914]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1718|1718]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – {{ill|Tachibana Kitashi|ja|立花北枝|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Kitashi|qq=|1=Tachibana Hokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q62085055}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of {{ill|Shōmon Jūtetsu|ja|正文宗十徹|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmon Jūtetsu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Shōan|Shōan]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1301|1301]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Prince Morikuni|Morihiro Shinnō]], the 9th shōgun of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1333|1333]]). * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1534|1534]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], a military commander (died [[:en:1582|1582]]). * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1698|1698]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Aoki Konyō|Aoki Kon'yō]], a Rangaku scholar (died [[:en:1769|1769]]). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1783|1783]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – {{ill|Ryūtei Tanehiko|ja|柳亭種彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryūtei Tanehiko|1=Ryūtei Tanehiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q541039}}, a playwright (died [[:en:1842|1842]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1843|1843]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Itō Sukeyuki|Itō Yutaka]], a naval officer (died [[:en:1914|1914]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1718|1718]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – {{ill|Tachibana Kitashi|ja|立花北枝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Kitashi|1=Tachibana Hokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q62085055}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of {{ill|Shōmon Jūtetsu|ja|正文宗十徹|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmon Jūtetsu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|11|5|13|4|12|6|5|0512|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Shōan|Shōan]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1301|1301]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Prince Morikuni|Morihiro Shinnō]], the 9th shōgun of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1333|1333]]). * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1534|1534]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], a military commander (died [[:en:1582|1582]]). * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1698|1698]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Aoki Konyō|Aoki Kon'yō]], a Rangaku scholar (died [[:en:1769|1769]]). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1783|1783]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – {{ill|Ryūtei Tanehiko|ja|柳亭種彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryūtei Tanehiko|1=Ryūtei Tanehiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q541039}}, a playwright (died [[:en:1842|1842]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1843|1843]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Itō Sukeyuki|Itō Yutaka]], a naval officer (died [[:en:1914|1914]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1718|1718]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – {{ill|Tachibana Kitashi|ja|立花北枝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Kitashi|1=Tachibana Hokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q62085055}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of {{ill|Shōmon Jūtetsu|ja|正文宗十徹|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmon Jūtetsu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Shōan|Shōan]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1301|1301]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Prince Morikuni|Morihiro Shinnō]], the 9th shōgun of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1333|1333]]). * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1534|1534]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], a military commander (died [[:en:1582|1582]]). * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1698|1698]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Aoki Konyō|Aoki Kon'yō]], a Rangaku scholar (died [[:en:1769|1769]]). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1783|1783]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – {{ill|Ryūtei Tanehiko|ja|柳亭種彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryūtei Tanehiko|1=Ryūtei Tanehiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q541039}}, a playwright (died [[:en:1842|1842]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1843|1843]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Itō Sukeyuki|Itō Yutaka]], a naval officer (died [[:en:1914|1914]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1718|1718]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – {{ill|Tachibana Kitashi|ja|立花北枝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Kitashi|1=Tachibana Hokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q62085055}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of {{ill|Shōmon Jūtetsu|ja|正文宗十徹|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmon Jūtetsu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events ==
== Births == * [[:en:Shōan|Shōan]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1301|1301]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Prince Morikuni|Morihiro Shinnō]], the 9th shōgun of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1333|1333]]). * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1534|1534]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], a military commander (died [[:en:1582|1582]]). * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1698|1698]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Aoki Konyō|Aoki Kon'yō]], a Rangaku scholar (died [[:en:1769|1769]]). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1783|1783]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – {{ill|Ryūtei Tanehiko|ja|柳亭種彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryūtei Tanehiko|1=Ryūtei Tanehiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q541039}}, a playwright (died [[:en:1842|1842]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1843|1843]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Itō Sukeyuki|Itō Yutaka]], a naval officer (died [[:en:1914|1914]]).

== Births == * [[:en:Shōan|Shōan]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1301|1301]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Prince Morikuni|Morihiro Shinnō]], the 9th shōgun of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1333|1333]]). * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1534|1534]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], a military commander (died [[:en:1582|1582]]). * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1698|1698]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Aoki Konyō|Aoki Kon'yō]], a Rangaku scholar (died [[:en:1769|1769]]). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1783|1783]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – {{ill|Ryūtei Tanehiko|ja|柳亭種彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryūtei Tanehiko|1=Ryūtei Tanehiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q541039}}, a playwright (died [[:en:1842|1842]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1843|1843]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Itō Sukeyuki|Itō Yutaka]], a naval officer (died [[:en:1914|1914]]).

== Births == * {{ill|Shōan|en|Shōan|WD=Q1327427|lt=Shōan}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1301|en|1301|WD=Q5610|lt=1301}} {{ill|June 19|en|June 19|WD=Q2669|lt=June 19}}) – {{ill|Prince Morikuni|en|Prince Morikuni|WD=Q552852|lt=Morihiro Shinnō}}, the 9th shōgun of the Kamakura shogunate (died {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333}}). * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|WD=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1534|en|1534|WD=Q6447|lt=1534}} {{ill|June 23|en|June 23|WD=Q2668|lt=June 23}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}}, a military commander (died {{ill|1582|en|1582|WD=Q6719|lt=1582}}). * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1698|en|1698|WD=Q7706|lt=1698}} {{ill|June 19|en|June 19|WD=Q2669|lt=June 19}}) – {{ill|Aoki Konyō|en|Aoki Konyō|WD=Q4067901|lt=Aoki Kon'yō}}, a Rangaku scholar (died {{ill|1769|en|1769|WD=Q7679|lt=1769}}). * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|WD=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1783|en|1783|WD=Q7745|lt=1783}} {{ill|June 11|en|June 11|WD=Q2617|lt=June 11}}) – {{ill|Ryūtei Tanehiko|ja|柳亭種彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryūtei Tanehiko|1=Ryūtei Tanehiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q541039}}, a playwright (died {{ill|1842|en|1842|WD=Q7625|lt=1842}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1843|en|1843|WD=Q7629|lt=1843}} {{ill|June 9|en|June 9|WD=Q2618|lt=June 9}}) – {{ill|Itō Sukeyuki|en|Itō Sukeyuki|WD=Q710382|lt=Itō Yutaka}}, a naval officer (died {{ill|1914|en|1914|WD=Q2083|lt=1914}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1718|en|1718|WD=Q6899|lt=1718}} {{ill|June 10|en|June 10|WD=Q2615|lt=June 10}}) – {{ill|Tachibana Kitashi|ja|立花北枝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Kitashi|1=Tachibana Hokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q62085055}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of {{ill|Shōmon Jūtetsu|ja|正文宗十徹|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmon Jūtetsu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
